title: Audit Logging & Forensic Readiness
description: Design systems for immutable, tamper-proof audit logging of security-sensitive events. Implement logging strategies that satisfy compliance requirements for forensic readiness. Enable rapid post-incident forensic analysis through well-structured and secure logs.
objectives: Design systems for immutable, tamper-proof audit logging of security-sensitive events.
Implement logging strategies that satisfy compliance requirements for forensic readiness.
Enable rapid post-incident forensic analysis through well-structured and secure logs.
